name: Spetzque
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces spaghetti sauce (Classico Sun Dried Tomato)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions. Drain.
2. Cook beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat until meat is brown and separated. Drain excess fat. Return the meat to the pan.
3. Add olives and onion. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender. Add spaghetti sauce and seasonings. Heat through, stirring occasionally; set aside.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Place 3 noodles in the bottom of a 13x9 inch baking dish. Spread half the beef mixture over the noodles, then half the corn and peas.
6. Repeat layers, ending with noodles.
6. Bake lasagne for 25 minutes. Sprinkle with cheese; bake an additional 5 minutes or until bubbly. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
